title: Torsional Properties of Fillet Welds
units_note: All welds are of unit width. Plane of torque couple is in the plane of the paper.
footnote: G is the centroid of the weld group; h is weld size; plane of torque couple is in the plane of the paper; all welds are of unit width.

schema.weld_type: integer identifier matching the textbook row number

location_of_G.x_bar_formula: string expression for x-bar, or null if not explicitly given in the table
location_of_G.y_bar_formula: string expression for y-bar, or null if not explicitly given in the table
location_of_G.note: optional note when the centroid location is conveyed graphically rather than by explicit formulas

rows.description: two parallel vertical line welds separated by b
L-shaped weld with legs b and d
C-shaped weld with two horizontal legs b and one vertical leg d
rectangular closed weld with width b and height d

location_of_G.note: Centroid G is at the center of the circular weld group. The table conveys this graphically rather than with explicit x_bar and y_bar formulas.
